name: Pharmagreen Biotech Inc.
business: Pharmagreen Biotech Inc. provides high CBD hemp plantlets, full spectrum DNA testing, live genetics preservation, botanical oil extraction (mainly CBD oil), and laboratory services to the North American hemp, cannabis, and agriculture sectors. The company also formulates nutraceutical products from medicinal mushrooms and plants, with its first product being MaxGenomic(TM) Supplement.
sellsTo: North American high CBD hemp sector

exposures.sentence: The Company s mission is to advance the technology of tissue culture science and to provide the highest quality 100% germ free, disease free and all genetically the same plantlets of high CBD hemp and other flora and offering full spectrum DNA testing for plant identification, live genetics preservation using low temperature storage for various cannabis and horticulture plants; extraction of botanical oils mainly CBD oil, and to deliver laboratory based services to the North American high CBD hemp, Cannabis and agriculture sectors.

The Company s mission is to advance the technology of tissue culture science and to provide the highest quality 100% germ free, disease free and all genetically the same plantlets of high CBD hemp and other flora and offering full spectrum DNA testing for plant identification, live genetics preservation using low temperature storage for various cannabis and horticulture plants; extraction of botanical oils mainly CBD oil, and to deliver laboratory based services to the North American high CBD hemp, Cannabis and agriculture sectors.

Pharmagreen's first new product, MaxGenomic(TM) Supplement, is a proprietary blend, formulated in the U. S. A., of nine medicinal mushrooms and six medicinal plants to help support the human mind and body.
